product: AI Agency Client Retention & Expansion Prompt Pack
description: 14 battle-tested AI prompts across the R.E.T.E.N.T.I.O.N. framework for AI automation agencies to retain clients, reduce churn, and drive account expansion
framework: R.E.T.E.N.T.I.O.N. — Review, Evaluate, Track, Execute, Nurture, Trigger, Identify, Optimize, Navigate
prompts: 1. R — Review Client Health Dashboard (7-dimension health score analysis)
2. E — Evaluate Client NPS & Satisfaction Drivers
3. T — Track Engagement Metrics & Usage Trends
4. E — Execute Value Communication (Quarterly Business Review Script)
6. T — Trigger Expansion Opportunities (Cross-sell & Upsell Identification)
7. I — Identify At-Risk Signals & Churn Indicators
8. O — Optimize Service Delivery (Process Improvement Analysis)
9. N — Navigate Renewal Conversations (Contract Renewal Script)
10. R — Retention Scorecard Builder (Custom Dashboard Template)
11. E — Early Warning Alert System Configuration
12. T — Tiered Retention Playbook (Gold/Silver/Bronze client levels)
14. O — Outcome-Focused Reporting Template (Value realization documentation)
15. N — Net Revenue Retention Calculator & Growth Tracker
target_audience: AI automation agencies with 10+ clients looking to reduce churn below 5% and grow existing accounts by 30%+ YoY
